creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

Mark as suspended because this is going to be worked on at some 
later time. 

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=19594 

Adding to audit trail by mcl on 3/20/2005:

As far as I can tell the latest comments above imply that this is going
to create a new port, x11/qrash-sdl, instead of modifying x11/qrash to
depend on sdl.  (Since this PR was submitted, trevor took over
maintainership of qrash itself but AFAICT it does not currently depend
on SDL.)

Accordingly, I am going to change the Synopsis with bugmeister hat on.
